notes: The off-site copy protects the backup PBS VM as a complete recovery unit, including the PBS datastore disk.
Hetzner Storage Box is mounted through Proxmox-managed CIFS storage on the hypervisor.
Native PBS remote sync is intentionally not used here because it requires another PBS endpoint.

scenarios.name: Single service failure
scenarios.notes: Docker restart policy or targeted service converge resolves the failure.

scenarios.name: Postgres VM failure with HA
scenarios.notes: Planned ADR 0098 failover target; included as the zero-loss design goal.

scenarios.name: Stateless VM failure
scenarios.notes: Applies to nginx and monitoring once restored or reprovisioned from IaC.

scenarios.name: Stateful VM failure without HA
scenarios.notes: Applies to docker-runtime and backup restore from the most recent backup set.

scenarios.name: Full host recovery with off-site backup copy
scenarios.notes: Restore backup from external storage first, then restore the remaining VMs from PBS.

scenarios.name: Full host recovery with no backup
scenarios.notes: IaC rebuild path only; stateful data is lost.
